violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the retail and refrigerator shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025

The floors under retail shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024

The floors in the milk cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2024
